reviews.text: Taking very good care of my father for 3 months time
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for your support and trust in our care for your father over the last 3 months. We are grateful for the opportunity to look after him and ensure his comfort and wellbeing.
Your appreciation means a lot to our team.
Wishing all of you good health and wellbeing always.

reviews.text:
我非常推荐这家疗养院。我妈妈在这里住了两个星期，这里的环境清静舒适，每位工作人员亲切有爱心，照顾得非常周到。待遇好，而且价钱也很公道，让家人感到安心又放心。

妈妈住在这里很快乐，一天四餐，食物营养又可口，每天还能和其他老人家一起用餐、聊天，生活规律又有伴。看到她精神很好、心情愉快，我真的很欣慰，也很放心把妈妈交给这里照顾👍👍👍
reviews.textTranslated:
I highly recommend this nursing home. My mother stayed here for two weeks. The environment is quiet and comfortable, and all the staff are kind, caring, and provide excellent care. The treatment is good, and the price is reasonable, making my family feel at ease and reassured.

My mother is very happy here. She has four meals a day, which are nutritious and delicious. She can also eat and chat with other elderly people every day, maintaining a regular routine and having companionship. Seeing her in good spirits and a cheerful mood makes me very happy and relieved to have my mother cared for here. 👍👍👍
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
感谢您给予我们这么高的评价以及对我们服务的肯定。能够照顾您的妈妈并让她在这里度过愉快又安心的时光，我们深感荣幸。
我们团队始终致力于提供细心周到的护理服务、营养均衡的饮食，以及温馨有陪伴的生活环境。很高兴知道您的妈妈在这里适应良好、心情愉快。
感谢您对我们的信任，祝愿您们健康平安。
We appreciate your satisfaction with 5 star review!

reviews.text:
I would like to express my sincere gratitude to the entire team at EHA Lakeview for caring for my mother during the past six months.

For a long time, my mother lived with me. As her health declined and her mobility became a serious issue, I grew increasingly concerned for her safety at home. The decision to find a nursing home was a very difficult one, and it was a choice I struggled with for a long time, given our cultural values.

Placing her in the care of EHA Lakeview brought an immediate sense of relief. The staff's approach to care was truly comprehensive. I was so grateful to see how gently they would move my mother, who was on a wheelchair, to the dining area or for her daily showers. They did not just care for her basic needs. In addition, they encouraged her to join activities in the common area, helping her with simple movements to keep her engaged. It was a comfort to see her participating in their Easter celebration, playing simple games with the other residents.

The medical attentiveness in EHA Lakeview was also reassuring. I appreciated that they had medical staff who could attend to her for minor issues. I recall a time she recovered quickly from diarrhea thanks to their prompt care. When more serious situations arose, like during her final week, they were extremely efficient in arranging an ambulance to the hospital. They did the same for her routine checkups, which took a huge logistical burden off me.

The environment itself also contributed to our peace of mind. She had a comfortable single room with her own fan, air-conditioning, and a TV. Most importantly, she could stay connected with us, using her phone and iPad to chat with family online.

Looking back, I know it was a necessary decision. The reality was that I could not provide the constant safety and professional care she required. Moving her to nursing home was difficult, but it was the right choice for her health and well-being. She was safer and received better care than I alone could provide back then when she was at home.

My mother has since passed away, and I am thankful to EHA Lakeview for providing a peaceful, respectful, and dignified place for her during her last chapter.

For others who may find themselves in a similar situation, I simply hope you find a path that brings peace to both you and your loved one. It is a difficult journey for everyone involved.

Thank you again to the EHA Lakeview staff for your important work. Our family would like to give our special thanks to Ms Yap for her management in the nursing home, and to all the dedicated medical staff and caregivers who looked after our mother.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Chun Lin Goh and Family,

Thank you so much for your heartfelt message. We are truly touched by your kind words and deeply honored to have had the opportunity to care for your beloved mother over the past few months.

We understand how difficult the decision must have been to place her in a nursing home, and we are grateful for the trust you placed in us. It means a great deal to know that our care brought comfort, safety, and dignity to her during this important stage of her life.

Your reflections remind us why we do what we do. Seeing your mother participate in activities, share moments with other residents, and stay connected with her family brought joy to our team as well. We are especially thankful that we could be there to support her not only in daily routines, but also through medical care and during times of need.

We offer our heartfelt condolences on her passing. Please know that she left a lasting impression on those of us who had the privilege of caring for her. We will remember her with warmth and respect.

On behalf of the entire EHA Lakeview team, and especially Ms. Yap and our medical and caregiving staff, we thank you once again for your generous words. Your message has uplifted our entire team.

Wishing you and your family continued peace and comfort.

reviews.text:
My 81-year-old father had a stroke in late June. Prior to the stroke, he was still able to eat, go to the toilet, bathe on his own, and I respected his wish to spend his time at home.
The stroke took away his ability to speak, walk and swallow, so I decided to send him to EHA Lakeview after he was discharged, so that he could be under professional care in a clean and quiet environment.
Unfortunately, he had lung infection twice after discharge, followed by a heart attack, which took his life about 6 weeks later.

Between juggling with daily work and life, and spending time with my father, I'm really grateful to the staff in EHA Lakeview who took real good care of him. Under their care, I could focus at work, knowing that my father is in good hands, and that I will be notified immediately if there are any issues with his health. I was also able to visit my father everyday before work, to check on him and keep him company.

Everytime my father needed to be sent to hospital, EHA Lakeview arranged for the ambulance swiftly, and after he was discharged, the staff paid extra attention in helping him recover.

Looking back, everything passed by so quickly.
No one could foresee his life to fade away so fast, and we were hopeful that he could slowly recover from the stroke and get healthier, but life is full of uncertainties.

Anyone would probably stumble on the painful dilemma of sending our parents to elderly care at some point. Many see sending parents to elderly care as a taboo, as an unfilial act. However, looking at the merits of doing it, such as the company of other elders and staff, constant monitoring and the ease of mind that we can get, isn't a bad choice too.

As much as I would have wanted my father to spend the final moments of his life at home, I knew that a more comfortable environment with professional care was what he and our family needed.

If you are reading this, you are probably going through the same dilemma or woes that I have gone through, and I can tell you that I have never regretted my decision to send my father to EHA Lakeview. I also hope the best for you and your family.

Lastly, I'm thankful to EHA Lakeview for all they have done for my family, as well as giving my father a respectful and pleasant stay at the end of his life journey.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your heartfelt story and experience with us, especially during such a difficult time for you and your family.
It was our honour to care for him, and we are grateful that you entrusted us with that responsibility.
Your words mean a great deal to our team. We always strive to provide not just professional care, but also compassion, dignity, and peace of mind to both our residents and their families. Knowing that we were able to give you some comfort and support during this challenging period means everything to us.
Thank you again for your trust, and for reminding us why we do what we do. We wish you and your family continued strength and peace in the days ahead.
Thank you for your 5 star review and trusting our eldercare services!
Thank you for your review and trusting our eldercare services!
We deeply appreciate your review and it truly motivates us to continue to serve the elderly with all we can.🥰
Thank You 5-star review! We will continue to do our best to take care the elderly with love and care 😍

reviews.text: Good service and friendly
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for sharing such a positive experience with our eldercare services! It truly means a lot to our team.

reviews.text: Very good services!!t Thanks to  Ms yap for her great support. And thanks to all the staffs for their great services!! She had a wonderful time being taken care. Thanks to Madam Chua making a wonderful and well balance meals for her.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your kind words and for sharing your positive experience at EHA Lakeview! We are thrilled to hear that you found our team members are caring and professional. 
We deeply appreciate your review and it truly motivates us to continue to serve the elderly with all we can.

reviews.text: To be honest, if able, nobody would want to put their loved ones in an eldercare home. But I’m glad to come across EHA. We had the 1st month at another eldercare home (due to cost) and transferred over to EHA the next month cos the other eldercare home was not able to meet our needs. We required short term stay for post surgery care, and EHA was so much better by leaps and bounds. They were able to provide us with periodic updates about the progress that she was having. Having an in-house doctor reviewing her progress was also great (being able to have a second opinion on Aunty Tan’s post surgery progress). Having a whole care team (nurse, caregiver, manager, nutritionist) makes EHA a well oiled machine (very efficiently managed and organised). Really appreciate the care given to Aunty Tan! Allows the family to have a peace of mind while she recovers post surgery. I also like activities encouraging Aunty Tan to get out of bed post surgery. I really recommend EHA’s services, we were so impressed that we extended her stay longer than expected despite the cost. It is well worth the money.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your honest and heartfelt feedback. We understand that the decision to place a loved one in eldercare is never easy, and we truly appreciate the trust you placed in us to care for Aunty Tan during her recovery.

We’re glad to hear that our care team — including our nurses, caregivers, doctor, and manager— was able to meet your family’s needs and provide both the medical support and peace of mind you were looking for. Your kind words about our team’s dedication, the structured approach we take, and the recovery-focused activities mean a great deal to us.

It has been a privilege to care for Aunty Tan, and we’re so happy to know that her stay with us brought comfort and confidence to your family. Thank you again for your recommendation and for recognising the effort behind what we do. We wish Aunty Tan a smooth and steady recovery, and your whole family continued health and well-being.

Thanks for your review!
We deeply appreciate your review and it truly motivates us to continue to serve the elderly with all we can.
Thank you for your 5-star rating! We truly appreciate your support and are committed to providing the best care and service. Your feedback holds immense value to our team.
Thank you for your 5-star rating! We truly appreciate your support and are committed to providing the best care and service. If you have any feedback to share, we’d love to hear it!

reviews.textTranslated: I feel at home here. The environment is beautiful, and the personal care provided by the staff and caregivers makes me feel respected and cared for.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 感谢您对我们的认可！我们很高兴您能感受到这里像家一样的温暖。为您提供尊重与关怀是我们一直以来的目标。您的支持和肯定是我们前进的动力，也让我们更加坚定为每一位家人创造优美环境和贴心服务的使命。欢迎随时和我们分享您的建议或需求，我们会继续努力做得更好！

reviews.text:
Friendly and patient healthcare staff. Good view and environment to rest after surgery
Appreciate!!!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your kind words and positive review! We are delighted to hear that you had a pleasant experience with our healthcare staff and enjoyed the environment. Providing friendly and patient care in a comfortable setting is always our priority.

reviews.text: The staff is friendly and took excellent care of my dad during his 2-week respite stay.  The environment is great, with spacious surroundings for morning exercise.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your kind words! We’re delighted to hear that your dad had a positive experience during his respite stay. Our team takes pride in providing excellent care, and we’re glad the spacious surroundings contributed to his comfort. If there’s anything else we can do, please don’t hesitate to reach out!

reviews.text: I had a great experience at EHA. And the staff talks very passionately about the elderly residents with very caring attitudes. Miss Yap & Shanna is a gentle and very professional. Probably the best in JB. You would not find any other places better than this. Strongly recommend!!!                                         I will definitely refer others to this centre
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Mr.Chong, Thank you so much for your kind words and for sharing your positive experience at EHA! We are thrilled to hear that you found our team members are caring and professional. It is truly our pleasure to serve and care for the elderly with compassion and dedication. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you and others in the future.

reviews.text: 这里的负责人叶小姐和护理人员给予了无微不至的关心和照顾不论是提供的服务，食物美味可口，还是温馨的环境，都让我感到非常舒适和温暖。谢谢你们。
reviews.textTranslated: Ms. Ye, the manager, and the nursing staff here provided me with meticulous care and attention. From the services and delicious food to the warm and welcoming environment, everything made me feel very comfortable and at ease. Thank you.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 非常感谢您对我们的认可和鼓励！我们团队一直以真诚和用心服务为宗旨，能够为您带来舒适和温暖是我们的荣幸。我们会继续努力，提供优质服务和温馨环境，让每一位长者感受到家的温暖。再次感谢您的支持！

reviews.text: Good environment and great staff/service!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for trusting our eldercare services! You are the reason we are dedicated to what we do.

reviews.text: 這裡的環境優美寧靜，非常適合療養身體。Miss Yap 很貼心關懷我的個人需要。護理人員很親切，照顧周到。食物另我回味，美味又健康。我彷彿住在一個大家庭，與其他的公公婆婆成為無所不談的朋友，也彼此交換聯繫方式。我在這裡學習如何做餃子，水彩畫畫。這裡給我一個難忘的回憶。
reviews.textTranslated: The environment here is beautiful and tranquil, perfect for recuperation. Miss Yap was very attentive to my personal needs. The nursing staff were kind and caring. The food was delicious and healthy, and I enjoyed it immensely. I felt like I was living in a big family, becoming close friends with the other elderly residents and exchanging contact information. I learned how to make dumplings and paint with watercolors here. This place has given me unforgettable memories.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for sharing such a positive experience and take your precious time to write such an awesome review. We deeply appreciate your review and it truly motivates us to continue to serve the elderly with all we can.
